title: Require Recipe Metrics Study Structure
forbids: recipe metrics capability roots without the required measurement, target, and study-bank topology
why: Metrics are an optional recipe capability, but every recipe that carries a metrics root must colocate neutral families, benchmark targets, executable studies, family sheets, and benchmark one-pagers in one predictable structure.
remediate: Add the required families, targets, and structured studies surfaces beneath the recipe metrics root.
message: Recipe metrics capability roots must match the positive metrics study topology.
